name: CollateralXStablecoinController

methods.name: initializeStablecoinController
methods.desc: One-time stablecoin controller initialization by admin.

methods.name: adminSetPauseFlags
methods.desc: Admin-only replacement of stablecoin control pause flags.

methods.name: optInToStableAsset
methods.desc:
Opts the app account into the stable ASA so it can hold mint reserves.
The app account must be pre-funded for the ASA opt-in MBR and inner fee.

methods.name: mintForVault
methods.desc: Manager-authorized reserve transfer to a vault owner.

methods.name: burnForVault
methods.desc: Manager-authorized burn/escrow entry point reserved for repayment flow.

desc:
Stablecoin control logic.

Safety-critical assumption: the stable ASA has a fixed reserve held by this
app account. The protocol manager is the only caller allowed to move reserve
units to vault owners.
